meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Student Guide: Mastering Client Workflow to Stop Collaboration Lag
content.seo_description: Master professional client workflows to solve collaboration bottlenecks. A beginner-friendly checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for AI builders.
content.answer_block: Collaboration failure usually stems from lack of technical alignment. By implementing a standardized feedback loop using Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for rapid iteration, you bridge the gap between student intent and client expectations. This workflow transforms chaotic feedback into actionable, version-controlled development cycles.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding your first SaaS, but the moment you present it to a stakeholder, the project stalls. The feedback is vague, the requirements shift, and you’re left staring at a codebase that no longer matches the vision. This isn't a failure of your code; it’s a failure of your collaborative infrastructure.

Professional development isn't just about writing syntax—it’s about managing the flow of information. By integrating Antigravity for structured planning and Claude Code for surgical execution, you move from 'student coding alone' to 'professional builder leading a project.' Let’s turn your workflow into your greatest competitive advantage.

steps.title: Define the Source of Truth
steps.description: Establish a singular document that tracks requirements to prevent scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a structured project requirement document template that tracks feature status, priority, and stakeholder feedback links.

steps.title: Automate Feedback Capture
steps.description: Use a structured format so clients can provide feedback that is immediately actionable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a feedback form that maps specific UI elements to requested changes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file feedback-schema.json --explain 'This maps UI components to change requests.'

steps.title: Implement Branch-Based Iteration
steps.description: Never push client-requested changes directly to main; use feature branches for safe review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a git workflow script that creates a branch named 'client-request-[id]' automatically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'git checkout -b feature/client-update && git push origin HEAD'

steps.title: Sync Code with Documentation
steps.description: Ensure your README and technical docs reflect the latest client-approved changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current codebase and update the README.md to reflect the latest implemented features and current limitations.

steps.title: Final Review & Deployment
steps.description: Run a final validation check before presenting the update to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a checklist for verifying that all client-requested changes in the feedback schema have been implemented.

pro_tips: Always wrap client requests in a 'Proposed Change' block within your code comments to track origin.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for specific client feedback to prove functionality before delivery.
Keep a 'Changelog' file updated by Claude Code; clients love seeing progress logs as it builds massive trust.
Never accept feedback via Slack/Email; force all requests into your Antigravity-managed tracking system.
Use AI-generated video summaries of code changes to explain complex technical shifts to non-technical stakeholders.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, perform a mock-client session where you present a feature update using the new documentation-first workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting communication gaps derail your hard work. By mastering this professional workflow, you'll finish projects faster and build a reputation for reliability that will launch your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
